tracks.rawText: 1:30LMFAO - Party Rock AnthemUploadElectro house and LMFAO-style party rock at 130 BPM in G minor, The track features a prominent four-on-the-floor kick drum and a heavy, distorted sawtooth synth bassline that follows a syncopated rhythmic pattern, Bright, staccato synth leads provide melodic hooks, while a recurring record scratch effect adds a hip-hop influence, Male vocals are delivered in a high-energy, rhythmic shouting style with frequent group chants and ad-libs, The arrangement includes high-pass filter sweeps on the master bus during build-ups and sudden drops into minimalist sections featuring only the kick and bass, Handclaps emphasize the backbeat during the chorus sections1PublishRemix
tracks.title: LMFAO - Party Rock Anthem

tracks.rawText: 3:05Flores En Puertav5.5Cumbia salsa with smooth piano montunos, soft congas, clean güiro, timbales, bongos, trombone hits, trumpet lines, and clave-driven bass tumbao, Radio-ready mix with warm vocal processing, bright percussion, and a tight brass section, Verses feel confrontational, with rising harmonic tension and crisp call-and-response phrasing1PublishRemix
tracks.title: Flores En Puerta

tracks.rawText: 4:30WhatsApp Audio 2026-05-02 at 01UploadSpoken word testimonial with a raw, field-recording aesthetic, A single female voice speaks in a conversational, narrative tone without musical accompaniment, The recording features a high noise floor with noticeable room ambience and occasional mechanical clicks or handling noise, The vocal is centered in the mix with a dry, unprocessed texture, capturing natural speech patterns, hesitations, and breath sounds, There are no melodic instruments, percussion, or rhythmic elements present, The tempo is variable based on the speaker's natural cadence1PublishRemix
tracks.title: WhatsApp Audio 2026-05-02 at 01
